message:
Multi-module correctness fixes: hash verification, UTF-8 safety, protocol simplification

ars_evidence.rs:
- Add entry hash verification to verify_chain(): recompute hash from
  (seq, category, timestamp, summary, payload, prev_hash) and reject
  entries where entry_hash != computed_hash. Previously only chain
  linkage (prev_hash) was verified, not content integrity.
- Add ledger_tampered_payload_detected test.

ars_secret_scan.rs:
- Fix UTF-8 boundary panic in context extraction: byte offsets from
  regex match may land mid-character in multi-byte text. Add
  safe_start/safe_end adjustment loops using is_char_boundary().
- Fix redact_context to operate on chars instead of bytes, preventing
  slicing mid-character. Collect to Vec<char> before indexing.
- Add redact_multibyte_context test with emoji strings.

error_clustering.rs:
- Fix minhash coefficient 'a' to be always odd (|1) so that
  multiplication modulo 2^64 is a bijection. Even 'a' values
  collapse the hash space.
- Remove PRIME constant; use wrapping arithmetic modulo 2^64
  directly (simpler, no modular reduction needed).

policy.rs:
- Refactor is_command_candidate to iterate all lines (not just first
  non-empty line), removing first_nonempty_line helper. Multi-line
  inputs like shell scripts are now properly detected.
- Restructure shell prefix stripping and token matching logic.

ring_buffer.rs:
- Fix total_evicted() to return telemetry.overwrites instead of
  computing from total - capacity (which was wrong when total <
  capacity, returning 0 via saturating_sub even if overwrites
  occurred due to ring wrapping).

search_bridge.rs:
- Add handle.thread().unpark() before join() on cancel and timeout
  threads. Since those threads now use park_timeout() instead of
  sleep(), they need an explicit unpark to wake immediately when
  the main thread is done.

self_stabilize.rs:
- Remove Diff variant from ReconcileMessage and RemoveKeys from
  RoundResult — the diff phase was redundant with the patch phase.
  Authority already computes corrections in handle_patch.
- Remove handle_diff method. Simplifies the 4-phase Merkle
  reconciliation to 3 phases (root hash → level hashes → patch).

terminalstate/mod.rs:
- Fix c1_index(): was scrolling up when cursor at bottom margin,
  should scroll down (IND moves cursor down, scrolling viewport
  when at bottom). Changed scroll_up(1) → scroll_down(1) and
  condition from end-1 to start.
- Remove c1_nel() method — appears to have been dead code with
  incorrect scroll direction logic matching the c1_index bug.
- Update c1_hts() doc comment.

egress_tap_integration.rs:
- Revert mut on mpsc::Receiver bindings (API changed back).

proptest_connector_lifecycle.rs:
- Remove unused TrustPolicy import, reformat version strategy.

proptest_connector_reliability.rs:
- Remove dead arb_action_kind() and arb_action() helpers.

config/font.rs:
- Add #[dynamic(default)] to is_fallback and is_synthetic fields
  in FontAttributes to prevent deserialization failures.

config/wasm_config.rs:
- Add env isolation to try_load_returns_none_when_no_wasm_exists
  test (HOME + XDG_CONFIG_HOME) so it doesn't pick up the user's
  actual config directory.

tabout/Cargo.toml, window/Cargo.toml:
- Add readme, keywords, categories metadata fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ft-3681t.5.8","title":"[connectors] Multi-host connector mesh federation","description":"Integrate mesh capabilities for running connector workloads across multiple hosts/zones while preserving policy, observability, and failure containment.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Q5.  {"id":"ft-3681t.6","title":"[epic] Unified policy, security, and governance","description":"# Epic 6: Unified Security, Policy, and Governance

Merge mux/orchestration controls and connector permissions into one enforceable governance model with approvals, revocation, and forensic traceability.","acceptance_criteria":"1. One policy model governs terminal actions, workflows, and connector capabilities.
2. Approval and revocation flows are enforceable and auditable.
3. Forensics/export cover operational and compliance needs.

Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. Added regressions: check_send_compatibility_path_uses_mux_surface and injector_policy_context_marks_mux_surface. I independently validated via rch wrappers: rch exec -- rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/frankenterm-core/src/policy.rs (pass); rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-crimsonforest-ft3681t61-policy cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib (pass); rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-crimsonforest-ft3681t61-policy cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib policy_rules_match_exec_command_surface_case_insensitive -- --nocapture (pass); rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-crimsonforest-ft3681t61-policy cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib explicit_surface_override_takes_precedence_over_actor_default -- --nocapture (pass). rch remote execution failed open to local in this environment.","created_at":"2026-03-04T07:09:46Z"},{"id":1878,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.1","author":"SwiftSpring","text":"Implemented policy-surface scoping for allow-once approval fingerprints in crates/frankenterm-core/src/approval.rs. Added regression coverage in approval_labruntime (approval_different_policy_surface_prevents_consumption), updated in-crate fingerprint tests, and added proptest fingerprint_surface_sensitivity coverage. Targeted tests pass via rch wrapper (fallback local): approval_different_policy_surface_prevents_consumption, approval::tests::fingerprint_surface_changes_hash, proptest_approval::fingerprint_surface_sensitivity. Workspace-wide cargo check/clippy currently fail due pre-existing unrelated issues in frankenterm-gui and other crates (missing k9/benchmarking symbols and clippy metadata/style violations).","created_at":"2026-03-04T07:36:56Z"},{"id":1884,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.1","author":"GoldBear","text":"GoldBear support slice (2026-03-04) for ft-3681t.6.1 in `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs`.

Scope:
- Strengthened dry-run policy traceability by surfacing explicit policy-surface evidence in send dry-run evaluation.

Code changes:
1) In `build_send_dry_run_report(...)`, after `engine.authorize(&input)`:
   - Added a `PolicyCheck` entry named `policy_surface` with message `Policy surface: <surface>` when decision context is present.
   - Added fallback `policy_surface` check with `Policy surface: unknown (context unavailable)` when context is absent.
2) Added regression test `send_dry_run_report_includes_mux_policy_surface_check` verifying send dry-run reports include `policy_surface` and that explicit surface tagging resolves to `mux`.

Validation (CPU-heavy commands via `rch exec`):
1) `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-goldbear-ft3681t61-main cargo test -p frankenterm --bin ft send_dry_run_report_includes_mux_policy_surface_check -- --nocapture` -> PASS
2) `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-goldbear-ft3681t61-main cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` -> PASS
3) `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-goldbear-ft3681t61-main cargo clippy -p frankenterm --bin ft -- -D warnings` -> FAIL on pre-existing unrelated Cargo metadata lint errors (`tabout`/`window` missing readme/keywords/categories)
4) `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs` -> PASS

Infra note:
- `rch` repeatedly attempted remote workers first, then failed open to local execution due worker SSH/connectivity errors in this environment.
","created_at":"2026-03-04T23:13:52Z"},{"id":1888,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.1","author":"SunnyBeaver","text":"Support slice (SunnyBeaver, 2026-03-05): added MCP SearchOutput policy-surface regression coverage in crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs via tests search_policy_mcp_actor_uses_mux_surface_override + search_policy_mcp_actor_matches_mux_surface_rule. Confirms authorize_read_or_search_policy keeps PolicySurface::Mux for MCP search paths and matches mux-scoped deny rules while bypassing mcp-scoped surface rules. Validation via rch wrappers: (1) CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-sunnybeaver-ft3681t61-search rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenterm --bin ft search_policy_mcp_actor_uses_mux_surface_override -- --nocapture (pass), (2) ... search_policy_mcp_actor_matches_mux_surface_rule ... Targeted clippy remains blocked by pre-existing cargo metadata lint failures in tabout/window under -D warnings. rch remote SSH failed-open to local execution in this environment.","created_at":"2026-03-05T01:23:13Z"},{"id":1889,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.1","author":"TopazReef","text":"TopazReef starting support slice in crates/frankenterm-core/src/mcp_tools.rs: factoring MCP policy input constructors for read/search/send/workflow/reserve/release/accounts-refresh with explicit PolicySurface mappings, then adding regression tests to lock action+actor+surface contracts. Coordinated with HazyBarn via Agent Mail and reserved file exclusively.","created_at":"2026-03-05T04:52:13Z"},{"id":1890,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.1","author":"TopazReef","text":"TopazReef support slice complete in crates/frankenterm-core/src/mcp_tools.rs. Added MCP policy-input helper constructors with explicit surface mappings (get_text/search/send -> mux, workflow_run -> workflow, reserve/release -> swarm), rewired tool callsites to use helpers, and added regression test mcp_tool_policy_input_helpers_use_expected_action_actor_and_surface to lock action+actor+surface contracts. Validation: rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/frankenterm-core/src/mcp_tools.rs passed. rch-offloaded cargo check command (timeout 420s rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-topazreef-ft3681t61-mcp-tools cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib) failed on pre-existing unrelated error in crates/frankenterm-core/src/policy.rs:3171 (E0631 Option::map signature mismatch). Targeted rch cargo test for new helper test (timeouts 300s and 180s) failed to produce green artifact due remote SSH fail-open to local and long compile timing out.","created_at":"2026-03-05T05:05:59Z"},{"id":1891,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.6.1","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"BronzeCove support slice (2026-03-05): cleaned custom-policy rule trace bookkeeping in crates/frankenterm-core/src/policy.rs to avoid duplicate selected-rule entries and surface matched rule IDs explicitly.

Code changes:
1) RuleEvaluationResult now includes matched_rule_ids and evaluate_policy_rules populates it.
2) PolicyEngine::authorize custom-rule trace path now records each config.rule.* entry with matched/decision/reason in one place.
3) Removed duplicate record_rule calls in deny/require_approval/allow branches for selected custom rule.
4) Added/updated tests: policy_rules_disabled_config_matches_nothing, policy_rules_precedence_priority_wins, policy_rules_integrated_into_authorize_deny, rule_evaluation_result_debug_clone.

Validation (CPU-heavy cargo commands via rch):
- rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-bronzecove-ft3681t61-policy cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib -> PASS (warnings only: existing dead_code in policy.rs + mux_client.rs).
- rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-bronzecove-ft3681t61-policy cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib policy_rules_ -- --nocapture -> PASS (19 tests).

Scope:
- Strengthened dry-run policy traceability by surfacing explicit policy-surface evidence in send dry-run evaluation.

Code changes:
1) In `build_send_dry_run_report(...)`, after `engine.authorize(&input)`:
   - Added a `PolicyCheck` entry named `policy_surface` with message `Policy surface: <surface>` when decision context is present.
   - Added fallback `policy_surface` check with `Policy surface: unknown (context unavailable)` when context is absent.
2) Added regression test `send_dry_run_report_includes_mux_policy_surface_check` verifying send dry-run reports include `policy_surface` and that explicit surface tagging resolves to `mux`.

Validation (CPU-heavy commands via `rch exec`):
1) `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-goldbear-ft3681t61-main cargo test -p frankenterm --bin ft send_dry_run_report_includes_mux_policy_surface_check -- --nocapture` -> PASS
2) `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-goldbear-ft3681t61-main cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` -> PASS
3) `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-goldbear-ft3681t61-main cargo clippy -p frankenterm --bin ft -- -D warnings` -> FAIL on pre-existing unrelated Cargo metadata lint errors (`tabout`/`window` missing readme/keywords/categories)
4) `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs` -> PASS

Infra note:
- `rch` repeatedly attempted remote workers first, then failed open to local execution due worker SSH/connectivity errors in this environment.
